name: Google Calendar
description: Manage your Google Calendar: list events, create meetings, update or delete events, and check availability. Uses the same Google OAuth as Gmail.
examples: Add a meeting with Paul tomorrow at 2pm
Show me my events for this week

commands.name: agenda
commands.shortDescription: Show today's and tomorrow's calendar events
commands.description: Use the gcal_list tool to retrieve events for today and tomorrow. Display them in chronological order with time, event title, and location if available. Mention any scheduling conflicts or back-to-back meetings. Be concise and practical.

commands.name: meeting
commands.shortDescription: Create a new calendar event or meeting
commands.description: Parse the user's input after the command for event details (title, date, time, duration, attendees, location). If information is missing, ask for it. Use the gcal_create tool to create the event. Confirm the details with the user before creating, then report the event ID and link.
